EmailTemplate.name: New Aircraft Approval
EmailTemplate.subject: Request: Approval of Aircraft {!leaseworks__Aircraft__c.Name} Required
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
{!leaseworks__Aircraft__c.OwnerFullName} has created an aircraft {!leaseworks__Aircraft__c.Name} type {!leaseworks__Aircraft__c.leaseworks__Aircraft_Type__c} registered in {!leaseworks__Aircraft__c.leaseworks__Country_Of_Registration__c} .
Your approval is required before this Aircraft can be added in to the system.
Please login to LeaseWorks and approve at your earliest convenience:
http://salesforce.com/login
